ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sag_mill_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the data collection */,
  "sag_id" INTEGER /* ID of the SAG mill */,
  "base_ore_mix" REAL /* Base ore mix composition */,
  "sag_j" REAL /* SAG mill energy index (J) */,
  "sag_pow" REAL /* SAG mill power consumption */,
  "sag_of_p80" REAL /* SAG mill P80 value (particle size distribution) */,
  "sag_j_m" REAL /* SAG mill energy index (J) measurement */,
  "sag_pow_m" REAL /* SAG mill power consumption measurement */,
  "sag_of_p80_m" REAL /* SAG mill P80 value measurement */,
  "ore_type" TEXT /* Type of ore being processed */,
  "ore_grade" REAL /* Grade of the ore */,
  "feed_rate" REAL /* Rate at which ore is fed into the SAG mill */,
  "mill_speed" REAL /* Speed of the SAG mill */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature inside the SAG mill */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity level inside the SAG mill */,
  "vibration" REAL /* Vibration level of the SAG mill */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sag_mill_data_sag_id FOREIGN KEY ("sag_id") REFERENCES sag_mills ("sag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sag_mills" (
  "sag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each SAG mill */,
  "sag_name" TEXT /* Name of the SAG mill */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the site where the SAG mill is located */,
  "capacity" TEXT /* Capacity of the SAG mill */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the SAG mill */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current operational status (e.g., active, maintenance) */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the SAG mill was installed */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the SAG mill */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the SAG mill */,
  "last_calibration_date" TEXT /* Date of the last calibration of the SAG mill's sensors */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sag_mills_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES sites ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sites" (
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each site */,
  "site_name" TEXT /* Name of the site */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the site */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the site */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the site */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the site */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the site */,
  "environmental_conditions" TEXT /* Environmental conditions that may affect operations */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_validation" (
  "validation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each validation event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data point being validated */,
  "validation_type" TEXT /* Type of validation (e.g., consistency, outlier detection) */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the validation (e.g., pass, fail) */,
  "validation_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the validation */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments */,
  "validator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the validation */,
  "validation_tool" TEXT /* Tool or method used for validation */,
  "validation_duration" REAL /* Duration of the validation process */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("validation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_validation_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES sag_mill_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_validation_validator_id FOREIGN KEY ("validator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data point from which the metric is derived */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the performance metric (e.g., energy efficiency, throughput) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the performance metric */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the performance metric */,
  "metric_date" TEXT /* Date of the metric calculation */,
  "metric_source" TEXT /* Source of the performance metric (e.g., sensor, manual input) */,
  "data_accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the data used to derive the metric */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES sag_mill_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date and time of the user */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the user (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data point being accessed */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the performance metric being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data or metric was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the user accessed the data */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for access (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "access_duration" REAL /* Duration of the access session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES performance_metrics ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES sag_mill_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "equipment_maintenance" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance event */,
  "sag_id" INTEGER /* ID of the SAG mill */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance (e.g., routine, emergency) */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the maintenance */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the maintenance */,
  "maintenance_cost" REAL /* Cost of the maintenance */,
  "maintenance_duration" REAL /* Duration of the maintenance */,
  "maintenance_performed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the maintenance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_equipment_maintenance_maintenance_performed_by FOREIGN KEY ("maintenance_performed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_equipment_maintenance_sag_id FOREIGN KEY ("sag_id") REFERENCES sag_mills ("sag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_readings" (
  "reading_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor reading */,
  "sag_id" INTEGER /* ID of the SAG mill */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the reading */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the reading */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the reading */,
  "sensor_reading_accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the sensor reading */,
  "sensor_reading_confidence" REAL /* Confidence level of the sensor reading */,
  "calibration_status" TEXT /* Calibration status of the sensor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reading_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_readings_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_readings_sag_id FOREIGN KEY ("sag_id") REFERENCES sag_mills ("sag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensors" (
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor */,
  "sensor_name" TEXT /* Name of the sensor */,
  "sag_id" INTEGER /* ID of the SAG mill */,
  "sensor_type" TEXT /* Type of sensor (e.g., temperature, pressure) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the sensor */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current operational status (e.g., active, maintenance) */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the sensor was installed */,
  "calibration_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency at which the sensor is calibrated */,
  "last_calibration_date" TEXT /* Date of the last calibration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "process_adjustments" (
  "adjustment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each process adjustment */,
  "sag_id" INTEGER /* ID of the SAG mill */,
  "adjustment_type" TEXT /* Type of adjustment (e.g., speed, feed rate) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the adjustment */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the adjustment */,
  "adjustment_date" TEXT /* Date of the adjustment */,
  "operator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the operator who made the adjustment */,
  "adjustment_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the process adjustment */,
  "adjustment_effectiveness" REAL /* Effectiveness of the process adjustment */,
  "adjustment_cost" REAL /* Cost associated with the process adjustment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("adjustment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_process_adjustments_sag_id FOREIGN KEY ("sag_id") REFERENCES sag_mills ("sag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_process_adjustments_operator_id FOREIGN KEY ("operator_id") REFERENCES operators ("operator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "operators" (
  "operator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each operator */,
  "operator_name" TEXT /* Full name of the operator */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the operator */,
  "shift" TEXT /* Shift the operator works (e.g., day, night) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the operator belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the operator */,
  "last_shift" TEXT /* Date and time of the last shift worked by the operator */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the operator (e.g., active, on leave) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("operator_id")
)
